concept: Midnight plum + copper. Minimal luxury wedding rental platform.

hierarchy.small: text-sm font-light uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400

spacing_and_layout.container: flex-1 w-full max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-lg lg:max-w-xl bg-[#FDFBF7] dark:bg-[#1A0B2E] relative h-full

vendor_card.wrapper: relative w-full h-[320px] rounded-[32px] overflow-hidden mb-6 shadow-xl
vendor_card.content: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full p-6 flex flex-col gap-2

button_primary.style: w-full py-4 bg-[#B87333] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform

date_picker.grid: flex flex-row flex-wrap justify-between gap-3 p-5 rounded-[32px] bg-white dark:bg-[#2D1B4E] shadow-sm border border-[#E8E2D9] dark:border-[#3D2B5E]
date_picker.cell_available: w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border border-[#4E7C59] text-[#4E7C59] dark:text-[#76B085]
date_picker.cell_booked: w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center opacity-40 bg-[#8C3A4D] text-white
date_picker.cell_selected: w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-[#B87333] text-white shadow-md shadow-[#B87333]/30

bottom_sheet.wrapper: absolute bottom-0 w-full bg-white dark:bg-[#2D1B4E] rounded-t-[40px] shadow-2xl p-8 z-50
bottom_sheet.handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-600 rounded-full mx-auto mb-6

Home.layout: Scrollable vertical list within the main centered container. Top header with app title and theme toggle.
Home.content: Render vendor cards. The cards should have gradient overlays so text is legible.

VendorDetail.layout: Immersive hero image taking top 60% of viewport. Content overlaps as a rounded bottom-sheet container.
VendorDetail.content: Vendor title, package options, and a sticky bottom CTA area containing the 'Check Availability' button.

Booking.content: Name/Phone inputs with floating labels. A custom date grid highlighting dates based on `calendar_states`.

Success.content: Large animated checkmark in copper, confirmation message, and a return to home button.

motion_and_interactions.screen_transitions: Slide-in from right for standard navigation, slide-up for modals/sheets.
motion_and_interactions.skeleton_loading: Pulse animation with soft plum tones. Ensure loading states are distinct when waiting for n8n API.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Midnight plum + copper' theme utilizing the hex values mapped to NativeWind arbitrary classes or extended Tailwind config.
For 'mobile + web seimbang', apply max-width constraints (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto) on web so the app looks like a sleek mobile frame centered on the desktop browser rather than a stretched web layout.
Ensure dark mode is fully functional with an automatic and manual toggle button in the header.
Build the custom date picker grid exactly as instructed using the Available/Booked/Selected color cues. Do NOT use a standard native datepicker.
Use the mock N8n approach for checking availability and submitting bookings with an artificial delay (setTimeout) and show loading states during the delay.
Make sure all interactive and form elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
Do not use generic placeholder images. Map the media_urls directly into the vendor data objects.
